expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The top category row is horizontally clipped, with the last tab partially cut off ('Hot Ga...') off the right edge.

The bottom navigation bar and content spacing feel tight, with elements sitting very close to the screen edges.
